summary: Completed testing of ShipRocket integration and dark mode/logo features. All 8 backend API tests passed. Frontend verification confirms: 1) Dark mode is default for new visitors, 2) Favicon uses Addrika 'A' logo, 3) Hero logo shows brand name with 'A' emblem in both modes, 4) ShipRocket API returns real rates (not fallback), 5) Weight calculation correct (50g=80g, 200g=350g), 6) Pickup pincode is 110078.

1_dark_mode_default.details: Cleared localStorage and verified page loads with 'dark' class on html element. localStorage addrika_dark_mode is set to 'true' by default.

2_favicon_a_logo.details: Favicon links point to /images/logos/addrika-logo-transparent.png (the 'A' logo). Both 32x32 icon and apple-touch-icon are correctly configured.

3_hero_logo_light_mode.details: Light mode hero uses same logo as dark mode: /images/logos/addrika-brand-name-gold-transparent.png - shows 'A' emblem above ADDRIKA text with tagline.

4_shiprocket_api_real_rates.details: GET /api/shipping/rates/quick?pincode=110001&weight=0.25 returns success=true with real ShipRocket rates: ₹35.40 via India Post-Speed Post Air Prepaid, ETD Feb 19, 2026

5_checkout_shipping_integration.details: Checkout.jsx correctly: 1) Fetches live rates when pincode entered (fetchShippingRates), 2) Converts cart weight from grams to kg (getCartWeight()/1000), 3) Displays courier name and ETD

6_weight_calculation.details: CartContext.jsx getCartWeight() correctly uses: 50g packet = 80g shipping weight, 200g jar = 350g shipping weight (for packaging and volumetric consideration)

7_pickup_pincode_110078.details: backend/.env has ADDRIKA_PICKUP_PINCODE=110078, shipping.py uses DEFAULT_PICKUP_PINCODE from env. All shipping rate calculations use Delhi 110078 as origin.

8_pincode_serviceability.details: GET /api/shipping/check-pincode?pincode=110001 returns serviceable=true with city=Central Delhi, state=Delhi

backend_api_tests.test_quick_shipping_rate_success: PASSED - Returns real ShipRocket rates with courier_name != 'Standard'
backend_api_tests.test_pincode_serviceability: PASSED - Returns city and state info
backend_api_tests.test_supported_countries: PASSED - Returns popular and all countries list
backend_api_tests.test_domestic_shipping_rates: PASSED - POST endpoint returns courier options

critical_code_review_comments: ShipRocket credentials properly configured in backend/.env with real email/password
Token caching implemented in shiprocket_service.py (20-hour expiry for 24-hour tokens)
Weight adjustments correctly applied: 50g→80g, 200g→350g in frontend CartContext
Checkout page fetches live rates on pincode change and displays courier name + ETD
Hero uses single logo (brand-name-gold-transparent.png) for both light/dark modes - includes 'A' emblem
ThemeContext defaults to dark mode (line 22: return true) when no localStorage preference exists
seed_data_creation: Created test cart item via localStorage for checkout testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: ShipRocket integration is fully functional with real API calls. Weight calculation: 50g packet = 80g, 200g jar = 350g. Pickup pincode is 110078 (Delhi). Checkout requires authentication - cart items are preserved. Dark mode is default for new visitors. All shipping endpoints working: /api/shipping/rates/quick, /api/shipping/rates, /api/shipping/check-pincode, /api/shipping/countries.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All requested features working as expected. ShipRocket returning real rates, not fallback.
